title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese examines four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team uses with Claude Code: automating existing workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building proprietary tools, and AI as thought partner. He argues most people hit a ceiling where AI becomes overhead rather than leverage.
